  'headline': 'Is Silver X Mining (TSXV:AGX) Quietly Redefining Its Expansion '

             'processing...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/silver-x-mining-tsxv-agx-043356676.html'},
 {'date': '2026-01-27 12:07:22',
  'headline': 'Assessing Silver X Mining (TSXV:AGX) Valuation After New '
              'Exploration Success At Blenda Rubia And Red Silver',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Silver X Mining (TSXV:AGX) is back in focus after reporting new '
             'underground drill results from its deep exploration program at '
             'the Blenda Rubia Mine in Peru, extending silver polymetallic '
             'mineralization below historic workings. See our latest analysis '

             'price return of 41.41%, a 90 day share price return of 180.00% '
             'and a very large 1 year total shareholder return of...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/assessing-silver-x-mining-tsxv-120722880.html'},
 {'date': '2026-01-26 21:28:09',
  'headline': 'Silver X Mining eyes 6M oz output by 2029',
  'publisher': 'Proactive',
  'summary': 'Silver X Mining Corp CEO Jose Garcia joined Steve Darling from '
             'the Vancouver Resources Investment Conference to share news '
             'about the company’s strong growth trajectory and expansion '
             'plans. Garcia explained that the Peru-based silver producer '
             'currently outputs 1.25 million ounces of silver annually, but is '
             'targeting a fivefold increase by 2029. He highlighted the '
             'company’s significant land package in central Peru and ongoing '
             'production, which is bolstered by favourable silver prices. '
             '“We’re going to demonstrate that quarter after quarter,” Garcia '
             'said, referring to ongoing productivity improvements and '
             'exploration updates. A key catalyst for this projected growth is '
             'a 40,000 metre drill campaign, which has already returned '
             'positive high-grade results. Alongside this, the company plans '
             'to double the capacity of its existing 700-tonne-per-day mill '
             'and construct a second processing facility. By 2029, Silver X '
             'expects to operate a mining complex with three mines and two '
             'mills, processing 3,000 tonnes per day and producing 6–7 million '
             'ounces of silver equivalent annually. Garcia also emphasized '
             'local support: “We have pretty good agreements, long-term '
             'agreements with our communities,” adding that Peru remains one '
             'of the most favourable mining jurisdictions globally. With '
             'recent investor backing and operational success, the company has '
             'grown more than tenfold over the past year. Garcia closed by '
             'noting that 2026 will bring further exploration and production '
             'results, along with progress on permitting to support the mill '
             'expansion. #proactiveinvestors #silverxminingcorp #otcqb #agxpf '
             '#tsxv #agx #vric2026 #SilverStocks #JoseGarcia #MiningInPeru '
             '#SilverProduction #MiningInvestment #OTCMarkets #SilverPrice '
             '#ResourceExpansion #ProactiveInvestors',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/video/silver-x-mining-eyes-6m-212809346.html'},

 {'date': '2026-01-10 23:12:27',
  'headline': 'Does Silver X Mining (TSXV:AGX) Production Growth at Nueva '
              'Recuperada Redefine Its Long-Term Story?',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Silver X Mining Corp. recently reported that fourth-quarter 2025 '

             'higher processed tonnage, increased silver-equivalent output, '
             'and substantially higher gold production. Beyond the production '
             'gains, the company’s sizable drilling campaign and ongoing '
             'underground development signal a focus on expanding resources '
             'and reinforcing long-term project potential. We’ll now examine '
             'how these production gains at Nueva Recuperada, particularly...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/does-silver-x-mining-tsxv-231227414.html'},

  'summary': 'As larger, high-grade mineral deposits become harder to find and '

 {'date': '2025-12-05 01:08:43',
  'headline': 'Can Silver X Mining (TSXV:AGX) Turn Cost Cuts Amid Lower Output '
              'Into a Durable Advantage?',
  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Silver X Mining Corp. recently reported its third-quarter and '

             'how this sharp reduction in net losses shapes Silver X '
             'Mining’s...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/news/silver-x-mining-tsxv-agx-010843629.html'},
